SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., SEPT-12-2012: LAWRENCE T. MA, ESQ. APPEARS FOR APPELLANT MR. SHAODYI TAN, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DATE; RESPONDENT MR.JOAQUIN MORALES APPEARS ON HIS OWN BEHALF IN PROPRIA PERSONA, ASSISTED BY HIS DAUGHTER AS A SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER; ALL PARTIES AND INTERPRETER(S) ARE ADMINISTERED THE OATH.

THE COURT HEARS PRESENTATION BY APPELLANT COUNSEL LAWRENCE MA, ESQ., FOLLOWED BY HEARING RESPONSE STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY RESPONDENT JOAQUIN MORALES, AND ACCEPTS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, WHICH IS RETURNED TO RESPONDENT J. MORALES.

AFTER HEARING ADDITIONAL STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, JULY-12-2012: PLAINTIFF JOAQUIN MORALES APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; LAWRENCE T. MA, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT SHAODYI TAN & LIU ZI XING THIS DATE.

SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER ROBERTO ZENTENO IS AFFIRMED BY THE CLERK AND ASSISTS PLAINTIFF MORALES; CANTONESE LANGUAGE INTERPRETER WENDY CHAN IS AFFIRMED BY THE CLERK AND ASSISTS DEFENDANT(S).

ALL PARTIES ARE ADMINISTERED THE OATH; WITNESSES AFFIRMED AND EXAMINED, DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED, DISCUSSED, BUT NOT RETAINED BY THE COURT.

AFTER HEARING ALL STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND AFTER REVIEWING ALL EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE MARK SEIDENFELD; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Judgment Entered
